SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summaryOff: App will not send notifications about upcoming routines
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summaryOn: App will notify you about upcoming routines
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable notifications

EditTextPreference.app:title: Set notification advance time
EditTextPreference.app:summary: How many minutes before the routine is due do you want to be notified?

Preference.app:title: Reset the app
Preference.app:summary: Delete all routines and reset preferences
